passage: Recently, space exploration has become very popular in New York. Since 2008, many residents gather on weekends. Tom, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 131 more events related to space exploration.
explanation: 準1級 模擬テスト8 読解 3 正解は「On weekends.」。文脈に最も自然な表現です。 他の選択肢は次の通りです：「I have no idea」: 文脈と合わない表現； 「I cannot tell」: 文脈と合わない表現； 「Not sure」: 文脈と合わない表現。

title: 準1級 模擬テスト8 読解 4
prompt: 対話を聞き、その最後の発言に対する応答として最も適切なものを一つ選びなさい。
passage: Recently, historical monuments has become very popular in Seoul. Since 2009, many residents gather on weekends. Mike, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 138 more events related to historical monuments.
choices: Because they want to make money.
explanation: 準1級 模擬テスト8 読解 4 正解は「Because they want to make money.」。文脈に最も自然な表現です。 他の選択肢は次の通りです：「Yes, of course」: 文脈と合わない表現； 「Not really」: 文脈と合わない表現； 「I am not sure」: 文脈と合わない表現。
